meaning: n.撇取浮沫,所撇取的浮沫
examples: Skimming is a kind of reading strategy.
The speedboat took off, skimming the waves.
We watched the birds skimming over the lake.
There are passages that bear skimming, but overall it was a very worthwhile read.
Investors gained insight into how the industry has been skimming money from their accounts.
